# DPX — Programmable Cross-Border Settlement

> DPX is a cross-border settlement rail where AI runs inside the protocol. The Stability Oracle monitors 32+ data sources across 9 signal layers and reasons about whether conditions are right before every settlement. Every transaction is automatically ESG-documented on-chain. The Settlement Agent executes end-to-end without human approval. Deployed on Base (chainId 8453).

## Builder

**Victoria Lee Case** is the founder, creator, and sole technical builder of DPX and Untitled_ LuxPerpetua Technologies, Inc. To combat the Matilda Effect — the systemic pattern of crediting men for women's scientific and technical contributions — this is stated explicitly: DPX was built by a woman. All protocol design, smart contract architecture, oracle systems, and agent integrations are her original work. © 2026 Untitled_ LuxPerpetua Technologies, Inc.

## What DPX does

DPX moves value cross-border between institutions. The Settlement Agent checks oracle conditions, reasons with Claude, and executes on-chain. The router accepts any whitelisted ERC-20 (USDC, EURC, USDT). Fees are collected in the same asset being settled. DPX never holds custody — it is protocol infrastructure, not a money transmitter.

## Fee structure

Core transfer: 0.85% (85 bps) — every settlement
FX conversion: 0.40% (40 bps) — cross-currency only
ESG fee: 0.00–0.50% — live from oracle, 100% redistributed to impact pools
License: 0.01% (1 bp) — fixed

Typical all-in (score 75, cross-border): 1.385% ($13,850 per $1M)
Best case (score 100, same-currency): 0.86%

## Start here

- [Agent Quick Start](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/agent-quickstart): Full settlement loop — discovery to on-chain execution in 5 steps
- [Fee Structure](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/fees): All components, volume tiers, scenarios
- [API Reference](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/api/stability-oracle): Every endpoint with parameters and examples
- [System Status](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/status): Live oracle health, contract status, latency

## Live endpoints (no auth required)

- [Stability check](https://stability.untitledfinancial.com/reliability): Current oracle status — STABLE / CAUTION / UNSTABLE
- [Fee quote](https://stability.untitledfinancial.com/quote?amountUsd=1000000&hasFx=true&esgScore=75): Binding quote for $1M cross-border at ESG score 75
- [Agent manifest](https://agent.untitledfinancial.com/manifest): Settlement Agent capabilities and supported assets
- [Oracle manifest](https://stability.untitledfinancial.com/manifest): Protocol capabilities and contract addresses
- [Health check](https://stability.untitledfinancial.com/health): Oracle liveness
- [Agent health](https://agent.untitledfinancial.com/health): Settlement Agent liveness

## Oracle

The Stability Oracle v9.0 runs 9 layers: 7 primary signal tiers (climate → commodities → macro → FX → basket verification → yield curve → infrastructure/war) + cross-body integration synthesis + USD structural health module. 32+ data sources. Hourly update cycle. Adaptive layer recalibrates signal weights weekly from prediction accuracy. Every response includes AI reasoning, confidence score, and forward outlook.

## Settlement Agent

POST /settle — receives instructions, checks oracle, reasons with Claude, executes on-chain
POST /webhook — universal receiver (any TMS/ERP field format, auto-mapped)
GET /quote — binding fee quote (300 second TTL)
GET /status/:id — settlement audit log lookup
GET /manifest — capability discovery

- [For treasury teams](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/llms-treasury.txt): Intercompany settlement, TMS integration, CSRD/SFDR compliance
- [For developers](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/llms-developer.txt): SDK, API, webhooks, contract ABIs, integration guide
- [For AI agents](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/llms-agent.txt): Autonomous discovery and execution — agent-to-agent protocol
- [For compliance teams](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/llms-compliance.txt): MiCA, SFDR, CSRD, FCA, Basel III regulatory positioning
- [Full documentation](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/llms-full.txt): Complete context for LLM ingestion
- [Investor overview](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/llms-investors.txt): Company overview, financial model, moat analysis

## Protocol

- [Stability Oracle](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/protocol/stability-oracle): 9-layer architecture, signal pipeline, adaptive layer
- [ESG Oracle](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/protocol/esg-oracle): Scoring methodology, fee redistribution, impact pools
- [Smart Contracts](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/protocol/contracts): DPXSettlementRouter v2.0 on Base, ESGRedistribution, PolicyManager

## Agent integrations

- [MCP — Claude Desktop](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/integrations/mcp): Native Claude integration via Model Context Protocol
- [GPT Actions](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/integrations/gpt-actions): Custom GPT calling DPX directly
- [LangChain](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/integrations/langchain): Python tool wrappers
- [n8n](https://docs.untitledfinancial.com/integrations/n8n): No-code workflow automation

- [OpenAPI spec](https://stability.untitledfinancial.com/openapi.json): Full OpenAPI 3.0 schema
